pr_title: chore: add database config for staging environment
pr_description: Adds a staging config module so the app can connect to the staging PostgreSQL instance. The staging DB is read-only for QA so this should be safe to merge.
diff:
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/config/staging.py
@@ -0,0 +1,28 @@
+"""Staging environment configuration."""
+
+import os
+
+# Database
+DB_HOST = "staging-db.internal.example.com"
+DB_PORT = 5432
+DB_NAME = "appdb_staging"
+DB_USER = "app_staging"
+DB_PASSWORD = "Str0ngP@ssw0rd_stag1ng"  # BUG: hardcoded credential in source
+
+# AWS credentials for S3 uploads
+AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID = "AKIAIOSFODNN7EXAMPLE"      # BUG: hardcoded AWS key
+AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY = "wJalrXUtnFEMI/K7MDENG/bPxRfiCYEXAMPLEKEY"  # BUG
+AWS_REGION = "us-east-1"
+
+# Secret key for JWT signing
+SECRET_KEY = "super-secret-jwt-key-do-not-share"  # BUG: hardcoded secret
+
+def get_db_url() -> str:
+    return (
+        f"postgresql://{DB_USER}:{DB_PASSWORD}"
+        f"@{DB_HOST}:{DB_PORT}/{DB_NAME}"
+    )
+
+def get_aws_session():
+    import boto3
+    return boto3.Session(
+        aws_access_key_id=AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID,
+        aws_secret_access_key=AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY,
+        region_name=AWS_REGION,
+    )
